name: CalendarHeaderComponent
description:
Internal use only.
Header of the calendar component.

inputs.name: activeView
inputs.description: Currently active view. Needed for a11y labels.

inputs.name: currentlyDisplayed
inputs.description: Currently displayed date on the calendar.

inputs.name: mobileLandscape
inputs.description: Whether calendar should be rendered in mobile landscape mode.

inputs.name: nextButtonDisabled
inputs.description: whether next navigation button should be disabled in the header.

inputs.name: previousButtonDisabled
inputs.description: whether previous navigation button should be disabled in the header.

outputs.name: activeViewChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the active view should change.

outputs.name: nextClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when the next button is clicked.

outputs.name: previousClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when the previous button is clicked.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Focus on focusable control within the header
